ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "experiment_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of experiment (e.g., cognitive, motor skills) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment */,
  "researcher_in_charge" INTEGER /* Researcher in charge of the experiment */,
  "protocol" TEXT /* Protocol or methodology used in the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_types" (
  "experiment_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment type */,
  "experiment_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the participant */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the participant */,
  "handedness" TEXT /* Handedness of the participant */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the participant is part of */,
  "performance" REAL /* Performance of the participant */,
  "progress" REAL /* Progress of the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the trial belongs to */,
  "trial_number" INTEGER /* Number of the trial */,
  "block_number" INTEGER /* Number of the block the trial belongs to */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the trial */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the trial */,
  "response_time" REAL /* Response time of the participant */,
  "completed" INTEGER /* Whether the trial was completed successfully */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "blocks" (
  "block_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each block */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the block belongs to */,
  "block_number" INTEGER /* Number of the block */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("block_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blocks_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial the data belongs to */,
  "time_elapsed" REAL /* Time elapsed during the trial */,
  "delta" INTEGER /* Delta value during the trial */,
  "click_num" INTEGER /* Number of clicks during the trial */,
  "placed_x" REAL /* X-coordinate of the placement during the trial */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the participant */,
  "movement_speed" REAL /* Movement speed of the participant */,
  "error_rate" REAL /* Error rate of the participant */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the researcher belongs to */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Expertise of the researcher */,
  "publications" TEXT /* Publications of the researcher */,
  "affiliations" TEXT /* Affiliations of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the configuration belongs to */,
  "parameter" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the configuration */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Creation date of the configuration */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Whether the configuration is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_configurations_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality check */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data the quality check belongs to */,
  "check_type" TEXT /* Type of quality check */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the quality check */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the quality check */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who performed the quality check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher in the collaboration */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the collaboration */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the collaboration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)
